records.label: Buying-price value of information
records.rationale: It changes the preference-elicitation and valuation frame rather than replacing expected-utility EVPI; retain it as an explicit related analysis.

records.label: Value of information on a constructed scale
records.rationale: The constructed-scale formulation broadens value measurement when a natural utility scale is unavailable, but does not create a replacement for canonical EVPI.

records.label: Robust expected information gain
records.rationale: REIG is a distinct robust information-design objective over ambiguity sets; it remains information-theoretic until a downstream decision utility is supplied.

records.label: Validation-study expected value of sample information
records.rationale: Validation EVSI is an application of EVSI to prediction-model validation and is represented by the validation VOI application contract, not a new estimand.

records.label: Blackwell ordering of experiments
records.rationale: Blackwell informativeness is an ordering over experiments across decision problems, not a scalar VOI estimand; it is valuable as a dominance diagnostic.

records.label: Value of signals
records.rationale: For a specified signal experiment, its expected decision value is sample information; strategic sender-receiver signal design is classified separately.

records.label: Value of clairvoyance
records.rationale: Clairvoyance denotes learning the payoff-relevant state before acting and maps to perfect-information value under the declared decision problem.

records.label: Value of control
records.rationale: Control changes feasible states or outcomes rather than beliefs; it must not be reported as information value, although a combined control-and-information model may be built.

records.label: Value of flexibility
records.rationale: Flexibility is option value from retaining future actions; VOIAGE represents it through sequential and real-options contracts and separates it from information value.

records.label: Rational inattention
records.rationale: Rational inattention endogenizes information-processing cost and capacity; it is a related framework that can instantiate net VOI but is not an alias for EVSI.

records.label: Bayesian persuasion and information design
records.rationale: Persuasion optimizes a sender-controlled signal under different sender and receiver utilities; it requires an explicit strategic extension and is outside the single-decision-maker core.

records.label: Strategic and multi-agent information sharing
records.rationale: Multi-agent information sharing is retained as an application only when incentives, private information, utilities, and communication actions are explicit.

records.label: Causal discovery and identification design
records.rationale: Causal discovery or identification becomes VOI when the learned causal feature changes a downstream decision; discovery scores alone remain related analyses.

records.label: Experimental design for model discrimination
records.rationale: Model discrimination is a design objective and maps to structural uncertainty or Bayesian design depending on whether utility is decision- or information-based.

records.label: Value of measurement and test accuracy
records.rationale: A measurement or diagnostic test is an information action with accuracy, cost, and consequences; its value maps to EVSI and data-quality VOI.
